h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: the medal label feels like the regiment getting to pin its version right onto the thing. But this copied memoir is messier, because it is not exactly a winner speaking from a podium
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it now, or I'm running ahead again
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was moving toward a graduated critique of the slogan by testing individual objects against it, expecting to refine rather than reconceive the slogan's subject.
